SQUALL_CRISIS.title: Crisis Level
SQUALL_CRISIS.description:
Reflects Squall's current danger level.

Gain 5 Crisis from attacks and Firepower consumptions.
Gain Crisis equal to damage taken. 
Gain Crisis equal to HP lost at the start of combat.

At 100 Crisis, put [gold]Renzokuken[/gold] into your Hand from anywhere and reduce its cost to 0.

After using [gold]Renzokuken[/gold], consume [blue]100[/blue] Crisis to unleash a Finisher.
SQUALL_FIREPOWER.title: Firepower
SQUALL_FIREPOWER.description: Build [gold]Firepower[/gold] by attacking. After 3 attacks, your next Attack consumes [gold]Firepower[/gold] and deals bonus damage.
